Welcome to AVAP

Are you experiencing an immediate emergency?

About AVAP

AVAP (Alabama Victim Assistance Portal) connects crime victims, survivors, and their families to trusted services and support across Alabama. The portal was developed by VOCAL – Victims of Crime and Leniency, an organization which has been supporting crime victims since 1982.

How AVAP can help

Through AVAP you can find agencies that provide advocacy, counseling, legal assistance, financial support programs, and other services for crime victims.

Finding resources

Use the filters to search by service type or county to locate help near you.

24/7 victim services hotlines

Tap a number to call.

  • 1-800-239-3219VOCAL — Victims of Crime and Leniency
  • 1-800-650-6522Alabama Coalition Against Domestic Violence
  • 1-800-656-4673RAINN Sexual Assault Hotline

Alabama Victim Assistance Portal

Privacy Policy: This site does not collect, store, or track any personal information. No user data is saved, tracked, or shared. All searches are processed only in your browser and are never sent to a server or stored anywhere.

No counties match your search.
